title: epi 26 Newspaper
wikitext:
[]: epi. 26 Newspaper             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Wed May 16, 2012 6:15 pm Does anyone notice that the date on the newspaper that Gendo is reading during the AU sequence is dated to September 2016...isn't that slightly odd of a date to pick?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 16, 2012 7:38 pm Episode 26 begins with "It was 2016 A.D.", why is that odd?

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Wed May 16, 2012 8:01 pm because wasn't those events occuring at new year, not september?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Wed May 16, 2012 11:28 pm Episode 26's AU was Shinji's Fantasy/"A dream where we're happy" so i wouldn't know if the date really matters or if it means anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu May 17, 2012 12:56 am The passage of time in the series is vague enough, and characters move on enough between episodes (like Asuka and Hikari becoming fast friends in the space between two episodes), that weeks could elapse between the bits we see. Ans some episodes explicitly cover long periods of time (including the one with the only anchor-point, the calendar in episode 9). A mid '15 start, and no seasons means we could carry through well into the next year by the end; so the 2016 eyecatch in episode 26 is entirely reasonable. The only support of the "New Year's day" chronology is the one continuity glitch where a computer display in EoE reads "2015" where one would expect a sane design to say "NOW".

[]:             Quote Post by Ceimoa Nan » Thu May 17, 2012 7:47 pm Also, for all we know, Instrumentality could've lasted for months. Episode 25 might've still taken place in late 2015, while Episode 26 begins anytime in 2016. For all we know, the Congratulations scene takes place in 2017, or 3016. This might apply to EoE as well. Maybe it was a thousand years between when Eva-01/The Tree of Life enters Lilith's forehead and when they burst out of her eyeball. But even saying the process took months... I guess that's only a way of reconciling Episode 26 with the computer display in Episode 25'? So there's no need to say it lasted any more than a few months? Unless you're writing fan fiction where other alien races reach Earth after detecting Third Impact's energy signatures and you don't want to resort to faster-than-light travel.

[]: It all comes tumbling down, tumbling down... B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat May 19, 2012 1:27 pm Ceimoa Nan wrote: Also, for all we know, Instrumentality could've lasted for months. Episode 25 might've still taken place in late 2015, while Episode 26 begins anytime in 2016. For all we know, the Congratulations scene takes place in 2017, or 3016.
